_howToUpdate: 1. Copy any object below and edit the fields.
2. thumbnail: put an image in /public/thumbnails/ (1280×720 recommended) and reference it as /thumbnails/your-file.jpg
3. video: put an MP4 in /public/videos/ and reference it as /videos/your-demo.mp4 — leave "" to hide the Watch Video button.
4. liveUrl / sourceUrl: leave "" to hide those buttons.
5. Save the file — the site updates automatically on next build/refresh.

projects.title: AI Lead Concierge for Dubai Brokerage
projects.description: An autonomous AI agent that answers every portal enquiry in under 60 seconds, qualifies budget & intent, and books viewings straight into agents' calendars. Response time dropped from 4 hours to instant.

projects.title: CRM Autopilot — Zero Manual Entry
projects.description: Full CRM automation for a property developer: every call, email and WhatsApp message is transcribed, summarised and logged automatically, with next actions assigned to the right agent.

projects.title: Listing Genius — AI Property Copywriter
projects.description: Generates portal-ready listing descriptions, social captions and Arabic translations from a photo set and a few bullet points. Trained on high-converting Dubai listings.

projects.title: WhatsApp Nurture Engine
projects.description: A 90-day intelligent drip system that revives cold leads with personalised market updates, new-launch alerts and payment-plan calculators — all inside WhatsApp.

projects.title: Investor Matchmaker AI
projects.description: Semantic matching engine that pairs off-plan inventory with the right investors using embeddings of preferences, past behaviour and ROI profiles.

projects.title: Agency Command Center
projects.description: A real-time dashboard unifying leads, deals, agent performance and automation health — with an AI analyst that answers questions about the business in plain English.
projects.highlight: One screen for the whole agency
